SELECT ceil(val) AS ceil_value FROM (SELECT val FROM test_values WHERE val < 0) AS subquery;
SELECT ceil(num) FROM additional_values WHERE num > 5;
SELECT DISTINCT ceil(val) FROM test_values ORDER BY ceil(val);
SELECT ceil(val + 0.5) FROM test_values WHERE val BETWEEN -50 AND 50;
SELECT t1.val, ceil(t1.val) FROM test_values t1 JOIN additional_values t2 ON ceil(t1.val) = ceil(t2.num);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_values WHERE ceil(val) > 0;
CREATE TABLE range_values (start FLOAT, end FLOAT);
SELECT r.start, r.end, ceil(r.start) AS ceil_start, ceil(r.end) AS ceil_end FROM range_values r;
